filter: homepage and top pricing blog only
query: SELECT properties.percent AS percent, properties.$pathname AS path, count(DISTINCT properties.$session_id) AS sessions FROM events WHERE event = 'scroll_depth' AND timestamp >= '2026-03-29' AND timestamp <= '2026-04-19' AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' AND properties.$pathname IN ('/', '/blog/is-claude-ai-free-pricing-guide') GROUP BY percent, path ORDER BY path, percent
